    M

    method() - Element in annotation interface com.habbashx.annotation.Request
    The HTTP method to use (e.g.
    method(String) - Method in class com.habbashx.proxy.MethodContext.MethodContextBuilder
     
    MethodCache<T> - Class in com.habbashx.cache.method
    Thread-safe, lazy cache that maps a Method to a computed value of type T.
    MethodCache(Function) - Constructor for class com.habbashx.cache.method.MethodCache
    Creates a new cache with the given parsing function.
    MethodContext - Class in com.habbashx.proxy
    Mutable bag of state representing a single in-flight HTTP request as it travels through the interceptor pipeline.
    MethodContext(String, String, String, String[], Object[], Method) - Constructor for class com.habbashx.proxy.MethodContext
    Full constructor.
    MethodContext.MethodContextBuilder - Class in com.habbashx.proxy
    Fluent builder for MethodContext.
    MethodContextBuilder() - Constructor for class com.habbashx.proxy.MethodContext.MethodContextBuilder
     
    MethodMeta - Class in com.habbashx.cache.method.meta
    Immutable snapshot of all annotation metadata for a single API method.
    MethodMeta(Method) - Constructor for class com.habbashx.cache.method.meta.MethodMeta
    Parses and caches all annotation metadata from the given method.
